title: Lovable for Classrooms - K12 teachers start for free
text:
Lovable for the next generation
Through imagi Edu, K12 teachers can bring Lovable's industry-grade AI tools into classrooms for free. Classroom-safe access for Grades 6-12 with all teaching materials included.
Start for free
Learn more
Software development is transforming, not disappearing
We're making AI developer tools accessible and age-appropriate for classrooms. Let's learn with AI, not just about it.
Loading video...
Getting started
1
Sign up to imagi Edu
Create your free teacher account
Create teacher account
2
Create a classroom
Set up your classroom space
Create classroom
3
Get student logins
Press 'Open Access' and get student logins
Lovable × imagi Edu: vibe coding for classrooms
Empower students to build real software experiences with AI as a creative partner.
No coding experience required for teachers or students
Privacy-first, COPPA-compliant, no student data collection
Everything you need to get started: implementation resources, lesson plans, setup guides, and classroom materials by imagi
K12 teachers - Start for free
A classroom-safe access that brings industry-grade AI tooling to Grades 6-12.
Includes all teaching materials by imagi
Anonymous Lovable accounts provided via imagi Edu
Start exploring vibe-coding with Lovable at your school
Start for free
